commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the latest head has no actionable review finding and remaining work is normal CI/maintainer review.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff changes TypeScript runtime/docs/tests/changelog only and does not add dependencies, workflows, permissions, secret handling, downloads, or package-resolution changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates heartbeat scheduling, per-agent busy-lane checks, HEARTBEAT.md prompt assembly, LLM stream setup timeouts, doctor heartbeat-session warnings, docs, tests, and changelog text.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence current-main reproduction path: current main serializes broadcast, uses global opt-in busy checks, and lacks a pre-stream connection watchdog. The PR body adds live after-fix logs for the multi-agent behavior.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the latest head has no actionable review finding and remaining work is normal CI/maintainer review.
